optionA.text: A single middorsally attached branchia present

optionB.text: At least a pair of branchiae present

optionA.text: Branchia a single tapering, digitate projection

optionB.text: Branchia stalked with four lobes; each lobe with numerous flat branchial lamellae

optionA.text: Two or three pairs of branchiae present
Two pairs of branchiae, 17 thoracic setigers

optionB.text: Three pairs of branchiae; 15 thoracic setigers

optionA.text: Each branchia with pectinate branchial lamellae

optionB.text: Each branchia simple and digitate or rosette-shaped
Fourth pair of branchiae sessile rosettes
